name: RuleTester exits non-zero when any case for any rule fails -- the H-11 CI gate red path
command:
mkdir -p tests/r/invalid && printf 'eval(bad)
' > tests/r/invalid/c.ts && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
exit 0
' > stub.sh && chmod +x stub.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/test-rule.sh" r --tests-dir tests --detector stub.sh 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'total pass=0 fail=1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
